sentences.target: Hier ist Rauchen laut Gesetz verboten.

translations.de: Hier ist Rauchen laut Gesetz verboten.
translations.en: Smoking is banned here by law.
translations.es: Aquí está prohibido fumar por ley.
translations.fr: Ici, fumer est interdit par la loi.
translations.it: Qui è vietato fumare per legge.
translations.pt: É proibido fumar aqui por lei.
translations.he: כאן אסור לעשן על פי חוק.
translations.vi: Ở đây cấm hút thuốc theo luật.
translations.nl: Hier is roken bij wet verboden.
translations.hu: A törvény szerint itt tilos a dohányzás.
translations.hi: यहाँ कानून के मुताबिक धूम्रपान मना है.
translations.pl: Tu palenie jest zabronione zgodnie z prawem.
translations.el: Εδώ το κάπνισμα απαγορεύεται από τον νόμο.
translations.nb: Her er røyking forbudt ved lov.
translations.id: Di sini merokok dilarang menurut undang-undang.
translations.sv: Här är rökning förbjuden enligt lag.
translations.ro: Aici fumatul este interzis prin lege.
translations.da: Her er rygning forbudt ved lov.
translations.fi: Täällä tupakointi on kielletty lain mukaan.
translations.ja: ここでは法律で喫煙が禁止されています。

tokens.explanation: Deictic adverb indicating location; sets the scene for where the statement applies.
Finite auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) functioning as a copula linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Nominalized infinitive (neuter, singular) functioning as the clausal subject in nominative case.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces a source of authority ('laut Gesetz').
Common noun (neuter, singular), genitive as complement of the preposition 'laut' (articleless genitive).
Predicative adjective (participle used adjectivally) serving as the predicate complement with the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Ich kenne das Gesetz dazu nicht genau.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə das ɡəˈzɛts daˈtsuː nɪçt ɡəˈnaʊ̯/

translations.de: Ich kenne das Gesetz dazu nicht genau.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə das ɡəˈzɛts daˈtsuː nɪçt ɡəˈnaʊ̯/
translations.en: I don't know the law about that very well.
translations.es: No conozco bien la ley sobre eso.
translations.fr: Je ne connais pas bien la loi à ce sujet.
translations.it: Non conosco bene la legge su questo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不太了解那方面的法律。
translations.yue: 我唔係太熟悉嗰方面嘅法律。
translations.ru: Я не очень хорошо знаю закон об этом.
translations.pt: Eu não conheço muito bem a lei sobre isso.
translations.he: אני לא מכיר טוב את החוק בנושא הזה.
translations.tr: Bu konudaki yasayı pek iyi bilmiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi không rành luật về việc đó.
translations.ar: أنا لا أعرف القانون المتعلق بذلك جيدًا.
translations.nl: Ik ken de wet daarover niet zo goed.
translations.uk: Я не дуже добре знаю закон щодо цього.
translations.hu: Nem ismerem túl jól az erre vonatkozó törvényt.
translations.hi: मुझे उस बारे में कानून ठीक से नहीं पता.
translations.pl: Nie znam dobrze prawa w tej sprawie.
translations.el: Δεν γνωρίζω πολύ καλά τον νόμο σχετικά με αυτό.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner ikke loven om det så godt.
translations.id: Saya kurang paham hukum tentang itu.
translations.sv: Jag känner inte till lagen om det så bra.
translations.ro: Nu cunosc prea bine legea despre asta.
translations.cs: Zákon o tom moc dobře neznám.
translations.da: Jeg kender ikke loven om det særligt godt.
translations.fi: En tunne lakia siitä kovin hyvin.
translations.ja: それについての法律はあまりよく知りません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person singular, nominative) functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present); selects an accusative object and allows adverbial modifiers.
Definite article (accusative, singular, neuter) determinizing 'Gesetz'.
Common noun (neuter, singular), accusative; direct object of 'kenne'.
Pronominal adverb referencing a previously mentioned/implicit referent; adverbial modifier indicating relation/topic ('with regard to that').
Negation particle; negates the predicate phrase.
Adverb of degree/manner; modifies 'kenne' to indicate precision ('not exactly').

sentences.target: Er liest das Gesetz vor dem Termin.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ liːst das ɡəˈzɛts foːɐ̯ deːm tɛʁˈmiːn/

translations.de: Er liest das Gesetz vor dem Termin.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ liːst das ɡəˈzɛts foːɐ̯ deːm tɛʁˈmiːn/
translations.en: He reads the law before the appointment.
translations.es: Él lee la ley antes de la cita.
translations.fr: Il lit la loi avant le rendez-vous.
translations.pt: Ele lê a lei antes do compromisso.
translations.he: הוא קורא את החוק לפני הפגישה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đọc luật trước buổi hẹn.
translations.nl: Hij leest de wet voor de afspraak.
translations.hu: Elolvassa a törvényt a találkozó előtt.
translations.hi: वह अपॉइंटमेंट से पहले कानून पढ़ता है.
translations.el: Διαβάζει τον νόμο πριν από το ραντεβού.
translations.id: Dia membaca hukum sebelum janji temu.
translations.ro: El citește legea înainte de programare.
translations.ja: 彼は予約の前に法律を読みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person singular, nominative) functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present).
Definite article (accusative, singular, neuter) determinizing 'Gesetz'.
Common noun (neuter, singular), accusative; direct object of 'liest'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP ('before the appointment').
Definite article (dative, singular, masculine) determinizing 'Termin'.
Common noun (masculine, singular), dative; object of the preposition 'vor' (temporal adjunct).

sentences.target: Die Lehrerin erklärt das Gesetz im Unterricht.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈleːʁəʁɪn ɛɐ̯ˈklɛːɐ̯t das ɡəˈzɛts ɪm ˈʊntəʁɪçt/

translations.de: Die Lehrerin erklärt das Gesetz im Unterricht.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈleːʁəʁɪn ɛɐ̯ˈklɛːɐ̯t das ɡəˈzɛts ɪm ˈʊntəʁɪçt/
translations.en: The teacher explains the law in class.
translations.es: La profesora explica la ley en clase.
translations.fr: La professeure explique la loi en classe.
translations.it: La insegnante spiega la legge in classe.
translations.zh-Hans: 老师在课堂上讲解法律。
translations.yue: 老師喺課堂上講解法律。
translations.pt: A professora explica a lei na aula.
translations.vi: Cô giáo giải thích luật trong lớp.
translations.nl: De lerares legt de wet uit in de klas.
translations.hu: A tanárnő elmagyarázza a törvényt az órán.
translations.hi: अध्यापिका कक्षा में कानून समझाती हैं.
translations.el: Η δασκάλα εξηγεί τον νόμο στην τάξη.
translations.ja: 先生は授業で法律を説明します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (nominative, singular, feminine) determinizing 'Lehrerin'.
Common noun (feminine, singular), nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present).
Definite article (accusative, singular, neuter) determinizing 'Gesetz'.

Common noun (masculine, singular), dative; object of 'im' functioning as a locative adjunct.
